formulas.name: Panchayati Raj Institutions (PRI) Act, 1992
formulas.notes: This act aimed to strengthen the Panchayati Raj system by giving 33% reservation to women in Panchayat bodies

formulas.name: National Commission for Scheduled Castes (NCSC)
formulas.notes: Established in 2005, it protects the rights of Scheduled Castes and provides them with social and economic assistance

formulas.name: National Commission for Scheduled Tribes (NCST)
formulas.notes: Established in 2004, it safeguards the rights and welfare of Scheduled Tribes

formulas.name: 73rd Constitutional Amendment Act, 1992
formulas.notes: It introduced the three-tier Panchayati Raj system and provided for reservation of seats for women in Panchayat institutions

formulas.name: 74th Constitutional Amendment Act, 1992
formulas.notes: It introduced the concept of the Municipal Corporation and provided for reservation of seats for women in municipalities

formulas.name: 72nd Amendment Act, 2000
formulas.notes: It added Part IXA and Part IXB to the Constitution, which deal with the Panchayats and Municipalities respectively

formulas.name: Right to Information (RTI) Act, 2005
formulas.notes: It provides citizens with the right to access information from government institutions, promoting transparency and accountability
